title: Nigeria needs more selfless Leaders to Succeed –ILMMD ..Honours over 96 fellows, others
description: The Institute of Leadership Manpower and Management Development (ILMMD) over the weekend honoured more than 96 Nigerians with investiture, conferment of awards and induction as new members into the in
html:
The Institute of Leadership Manpower and Management Development (ILMMD) over the weekend honoured more than 96 Nigerians with investiture, conferment of awards and induction as new members into the institute.

The event which held at Airport Hotel, Ikeja, Lagos was graced by Tony Abang, Member of Board of Trusties in Ibadan, Dr Francis Lambe Sunday who represented the Chairman, Mr Emeka Aguobi Member Board of Trustees, Dr Babateye Akinyede, Director of Protocol among others.

Speaking at the event ILMMD Director of Programs, Dr Charles Eromosele said that leadership is of great importance in national development and that is why the institute was found According to him if the principles of leadership could be imbibed by Nigerians of various hues and colours ;then its predicament as a nation would easily be resolved in the overall interest of all and sundry. Therefore he called on the nation to pay heed to our leadership development strategy as a people

In his address ,the Director of Membership Services, Dr Theophilous Okonofua stressed the need for Nigerians and others to live above board, saying that the awardees should ensure that they live a life of example.

He challenged them to live a principled based lives, urging the to respect principles, respect the laws of the land, respect the truth and respect their names etc.

According to him they should not aspire to live a life based on just prosperity ,but a life based on affecting and impacting on posterity positively. Maintaining that our lives to have meaning must impact on the larger society in which we live.

The mission of ILMMD is to  create a skillful work force with outstanding skills required to succeed where competition excel. While its vision is to develop skills and build careers for professional excellence.

The investiture and awards giving event was well attended by a cross section of new members, awardees and their family and friends
